commands.review_summary:
The branch expands CI fast-routing scope for changed-check, run-vitest, and test-projects harness files and adds the matching owner tests to the fast CI task.

PR surface: Tests +7, Config 0, Other +1. Total +8 across 5 files.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is CI routing maintenance rather than a reported runtime bug. Source review traces the route through detectNodeFastScope and the CI manifest, and the PR body lists focused Vitest plus Testbox check:changed validation.

target.title: ci: keep harness changes on fast checks
target.body:
Summary
- Route changed-check and Vitest harness edits through the fast CI-routing path instead of the full Node shard graph.
- Keep the fast CI-routing workflow task aligned with the owner tests for changed-lanes, run-vitest, test-projects, and CI scope routing.
- Preserve full core lint fallback for deleted, broad, or lint-config-impacting core diffs while allowing workflow-only mixed diffs to use targeted core lint.

Verification
- node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/scripts/ci-changed-scope.test.ts test/scripts/changed-lanes.test.ts test/scripts/run-vitest.test.ts test/scripts/test-projects.test.ts
- pnpm check:changed --timed (Testbox tbx_01ksx540yn3rvgj196e9t03g14, command 2m07s, total 2m12s)
- autoreview --mode local --base origin/main
- git diff --check
target.author: steipete
